name: Lemon Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the lemon jello, sugar, boiling water, lemon juice, and rind.
2. Chill until syrupy.
3. Whip the chilled mixture.
4. Whip the can of cream.
5. Whisk the cream into the lemon mixture.
6. Line a 9 x 13 x 2 inch pan with half of the crushed graham crackers.
7. Pour the lemon mixture over the crumbs.
8. Sprinkle remaining crumbs on top.
9. Keep in refrigerator until ready to serve.
